title: rhododendron tetramerum
intro: Rhododendron tetramerum, also known as the white pond azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The rhododendron tetramerum has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
